title: The God’s Knights Move on Elbaf
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Robin, Unknown person #13, Saul, Unknown person #14 as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's not focus not focus on the dark stuff!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't you. Going to praise me for being alive?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right!! Of course I am!! A kid like you against the whole wide world?!

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: You did great staying alive, Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Thank you for being such a survivor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so glad we're able to meet again after all this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why am I the one who has to live?!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: I've missed you so much, Saul!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: DERE SHI SH!!! I missed you, too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A tearful reunion!! Color spread next issue!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 17 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
